1.SUBTITLE: Use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to connect tools to models cleanly.

2.SUBHEAD: Each API wrapper is another source of maintenance overhead and API drift.
2.BODY_TEXT: Developers spend days gluing together custom API endpoints to get LLMs to talk to databases.

3.BODY_TEXT: Clients connect to servers over standard inputs and outputs using JSON-RPC protocols.

4.SUBHEAD: Expose database schemas to the LLM securely without custom backend code.
4.BODY_TEXT: Use npx @modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres to query tables instantly.

5.BODY_TEXT: Servers only receive specific instructions, preventing API key exposure to LLM contexts.

6.SUBHEAD: Stop rebuilding the wheel for Claude, Gemini, or local models.
6.BODY_TEXT: Exposing your custom database tools as an MCP server works across all supported platforms.

7.SUBHEAD: Build tools that conform to MCP specifications. Accelerate agentic workflows without custom glue.
